title: Electrical appliances and lamps
description: The next step is to modify the model to make a portion of ...
body:
**wraparound**
--------------
This is a Electrical appliances and lamps mod that can make the house more realistic

**note**
--------------
The mod is now available in version 1.20, the module abides by the CC-BY-SA-4.0 protocol, If you want to transfer this module page, just keep the original author link on the transferred module page and indicate that this module may not be compatible with your language version.

the frequency of module updates is relatively random, so it is normal not to update for a long time, please understand, the module supports version 1.21.1 in the next version, and the module will no longer provide new version support for version 1.20.4, but will continue to provide version support for version 1.20.1
**Added items**
--------------
1. fluorescent lamp
2. LED lights
3. Ceiling lights
4. Aluminum gusset
5. A wide variety of gas discharge lamps
6. More decorative items
7. New electrical products will be added
